Auth: run claude (OAuth Pro/Max) or set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

Let the agent know once the CLI is ready

skills.name: fastmcp
skills.descId: Build, test, and deploy MCP servers using FastMCP (Python). For developers extending agent capabilities via custom tools/MCP.

setup.label: Requires: FastMCP server setup
steps: Install FastMCP (pip install fastmcp)
Create/host your MCP server
Connect it to the agent via MCP configuration
setup.chatPrompt: I want to build/connect an MCP server using FastMCP. Please guide me through the setup step-by-step.

skills.name: mcporter
skills.descId: List, configure, authenticate, and call MCP servers/tools directly via the mcporter CLI (HTTP/stdio). For working with multiple MCPs.

setup.label: Requires: MCP server configuration
steps: Identify the MCP server you want to use (HTTP or stdio)
Fill in the connection configuration (command/URL + credentials if needed)
Authenticate via mcporter if the server requires login
Give the configuration to the agent
setup.chatPrompt: I want to connect an MCP server using mcporter. Please guide me through setting up the configuration step-by-step.

Grab your API key from the dashboard
Set LAMBDA_API_KEY or give it to the agent
Prepare an SSH key for instance access

skills.name: 1password
